PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?battleLabel ?warLabel ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  VALUES ?war { wd:Q1151913 wd:Q916495 wd:Q1342568 }
  ?battle wdt:P31 wd:Q1007 .  # instance of battle
  ?battle wdt:P607 ?war .     # conflict property
  ?battle wdt:P1346 ?winner . # winner
  ?battle rdfs:label ?battleLabel .
  ?war rdfs:label ?warLabel .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER (LANG(?battleLabel) = "en")
  FILTER (LANG(?warLabel) = "en")
  FILTER (LANG(?winnerLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY ?warLabel
